warnings: The single-line diagram shows 6 populated breaker positions (main 50AT,2P + six branch breakers) but the printed position numbers read 1,2,3,4,(unlabeled),6 -- position 5's number is not legibly printed above its breaker in the source image; not invented, flagged instead per protection-rule guidance. It is very likely simply '5' given the sequence, but left as position:null with a confidence flag rather than assumed.

This EE-02 sheet (main distribution panel one-line diagram) has no equivalent extracted file in house #3's already-completed set (house #3's batch jumped straight from page 56 (EE-01 index/symbol) to page 58 (EE-03 lighting plan), skipping its own EE-02 page 57) -- so this file has no direct sibling-house reference to calibrate the exact field shape against; structured using the general 'schedule' pattern conventions from primary_rawjson_schema.md instead.

Two water-heater junction-box circuits (RCBO 20AT) are provided even though only one water heater circuit note appeared on EE-01's symbol legend (WH box) -- likely one per bathroom (this house's floor plans show 2 ห้องน้ำ per the structural/site pages), not cross-verified against a bathroom count on this page alone.
4 spare (ว่าง) breaker positions (7-10) are drawn as bare vertical lines with no breaker glyph, consistent with reserved future-expansion slots on the panel.
